name: Tenra AI Multichat
short_description: Combine chat from YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, and Trovo into one smart overlay. Display it in OBS or TikTok Live Studio, enable voice reading, customize looks, and get AI chat summaries
detailed_description:
🎮 What is Tenra AI Multichat?

Tenra AI Multichat is a real-time chat overlay for streamers who go live on YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, and Trovo.

It gathers all messages from every platform and displays them in one clean, customizable chat — both inside the app and as an overlay for OBS or TikTok Live Studio.

Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned streamer, it helps you stay connected with your audience across all platforms, without missing a moment.

✨ Key Features

✅ Unified chat from multiple platforms — all in one place
🎨 Fully customizable look — show/hide platform logos, color accents, avatars, gift icons, and more
🧼 Spam filter — keep your chat clean and readable
🗣️ Voiceover support — reads messages aloud with natural-sounding voices
🧠 AI Chat Summarizer — lets you know what’s going on when chat moves too fast
🎭 Choose different personalities for AI summaries — like “cool buddy”, “gangster”, or “silly friend”
🎁 Donation & Subscription Alerts for TikTok — complete with sound, animation, and text
🎚️ Adjustable chat widget height and zoom, with theme selection
💻 Built for OBS & TikTok Live Studio integration
🔧 Designed for Windows with a lightweight, user-friendly interface

🎨 Platform Display Options

You can choose how platforms are shown:

  • By logo

  • By color only (YouTube = red, TikTok = blue, Twitch = purple, Trovo = green)

  • Or keep it completely neutral

This gives you full control and avoids platform conflict rules when needed.

"The app supports login with Google and Steam accounts."
